title: How Breath-Control Can Change Your Life: A Systematic Review on Psycho-Physiological Correlates of Slow Breathing
headline: How Breath-Control Can Change Your Life: A Systematic Review on Psycho-Physiological Correlates of Slow Breath
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of breath-and-attention meditation examined emotional wellbeing.
keyFindings: See the linked paper for detailed results.
limitations: Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
The practice studied (breath-and-attention meditation) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
